title: A True Hotel Is Always Storied
overview: Yachiyo and her staff are ready to welcome you to the Gingarou Hotel... except there's nobody left on Earth.

title: Tradition Evolves with Innovation and Experimentation
overview: The Gingarou Hotel gets its first guest in over a century, but he's not human! Do aliens even count as guests?

title: A Smile Is the Ultimate Ambiance
overview: A group of humans return to Earth... but not all is as it seems.

title: Food and Etiquette Are Mainstays of Culture
overview: Yachiyo and Ponko head out in search of new ingredients.

title: Provide Unlimited Hospitality in Limited Time
overview: A new pair of aliens arrive at the hotel, but the shortage of alcohol will be a problem.

title: Our Only Vice Is Service
overview: The end times have come to Earth... and it seems they will be staying at the Gingarou Hotel?

title: Bow Down Deep But Always Aim High
overview: The gang decides to launch a satellite for promotion, but Ponko has other ideas.

title: Discipline with a Fist! Reconcile with a High Five!
overview: What happens after Yachiyo gets stranded in space?

title: Bookmark Today's Page in Our Guests' Lives
overview: After reconciling with Yachiyo, Ponko has some news to share.

title: Clean Sheets Symbolize Pure Hearts
overview: The Gingarou receives an unnerving guest who requests total secrecy about his visit...

title: Wag Your Tail, but Never Wag a Shift!
overview: Labor standards say Yachiyo has been overworked, and Ponko demands that she take time off.

title: Aim to Be the Number One Hotel in the Galaxy
overview: Gingarou and Earth receive a visit from an old, old friend.
